name: Projection
summary: The Projection class contains methods for calculating the projection of geometric objects on other geometric objects.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane
methods.summary: Returns a new line segment which is a projection of the given line segment onto the given plane.

methods.name: LineToPlane
methods.summary: Returns a new line which is a projection of the given line onto the given plane.

methods.name: PointToLine
methods.summary: Returns a new point which is a projection of the given point onto the given line.

methods.name: PointToPlane
methods.summary: Returns a new point which is a projection of the given point onto the given plane.
